title: Model Formulation, Identifiability, and Validation · Guided Modeling Studio
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving energy demand and storage. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a reproducible model rigor computational study while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate identifiability in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive nondimensionalization in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute calibration validation in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
